name: Salata Maroulia (Lettuce Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chopped dill OR anise seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce.
2. Save the hearts and tear the remaining leaves into pieces.
3. Cut half of the potatoes into small cubes; cut the rest into round slices.
4. Slice 2 of the eggs; crumble the yolk of the third egg.
5. Mix the lettuce, potato cubes, scallions, and dill or anise seed together.
6. Blend the oil and vinegar and sprinkle over the salad mixture.
7. Let the salad rest for 5 to 10 minutes.
8. Mix in half of the mayonnaise.
9. Place the salad on a round platter.
10. Cover with the remaining mayonnaise.
11. Surround with egg slices, potato slices, and olives.
12. Sprinkle with parsley and crumbled egg yolk.
13. Place in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
